# LEZAC explosion playback oracle malformed fixture.
# Collapse lane writeback tags must map to DI with tag * 0x0f.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-regular-process-memory
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
instrumented_freeze_observed=1
runtime_freeze_patch_applied=1
instrumented_lane_write_scratch_present=1
instrumented_lane_write_cs_offset=0x3d6b
instrumented_lane_write_kind=forward
instrumented_lane_write_target=collapse
instrumented_lane_write_output=0x0001
instrumented_lane_write_di=0x002c
instrumented_lane_write_tag=0x0003
instrumented_lane_write_active_count=0x0001
instrumented_lane_write_loop_index=0x0001
instrumented_lane_write_result_local=0x0001

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C

break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue
break ghidra=1000:3D1B runtime=1A2B:3D1B label=collapse_forward_lane_write_collapse observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed
